scriptLines: aggregate2 derive(zippedarraydata = mapIndex(Airline_lists, @(airline_name = #item, airline_id = Airline_ids_lists[#index]))) ~> ZippedData

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select * from dbo.FactBookings
where booking_date > '@{activity('LastLoadLookup').output.firstRow.LastLoad}'
and booking_date <= '@{activity('LatestLoadLookup').output.firstRow.latestload}'

select max(booking_date) as latestload
from dbo.FactBookings
